title: Authentication and Authorization Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of identity vs permissions, the role of RBAC, and the comparison between Session-based and JWT token-based security.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily role of 'Authentication' in a web application?
options: Verifying a user's 'identity' (usually via email/password or social login) to prove who they are.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.

questions.question: Which and/or what was the primarily role of 'Authorization'?
options: To decide what a user is allowed to do or access inside a system (e.g., admin vs. member).

questions.question: Which stateless tool is the industry standard for modern, mobile-friendly APIs for managing user identity after login?
Which security pattern uses groups like 'Admin', 'Editor', and 'Member' to manage user permissions?
Does following a solid 'Authentication' strategy help prevent unauthorized access to sensitive user and application data?
options: Yes, as it is the first line of defense for any professional web application.
